match.userMessage:
Steady handheld camera tracks forward at eye level. Scarlett holds her over-the-shoulder glance with a half-smile, then turns her head and body forward, walking along the paved path toward the sand. The canvas tote swings gently at her side while blonde hair lifts in the breeze and turquoise waves roll steadily behind her.

ocean waves and light wind on the promenade. soft footsteps on pavement, fabric of tote bag shifting.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
